turns.content: What brings you in today?
Can't breathe, doc. Started a few days ago, just keeps getting worse. Feels like I'm drowning.
When did this start?
Three days ago. It was bad then, now it's real bad. Can't even walk to the bathroom without gasping.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
Right here in my chest. It's tight, like something's squeezing me. Coughing brings up thick, sticky stuff.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No fever. Just the trouble breathing and the tight chest.
What medications are you currently taking?
Just my heart pill and a water pill. Can't remember the names. Little blue one and a white one.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Yeah, got a bad heart. Had breathing trouble before, but nothing like this. Doctor said something about my lungs before too.
Are you allergic to any medications?
Don't think so. I've had penicillin before, broke out in a rash. That's it.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
Ain't got no inhaler. Just tried sitting up, but that don't help. Nothin' works.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Lying down makes it worse. Can't breathe at all flat. Sitting up helps a little, but not much.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
Can't do nothin'. Can't sleep, can't eat, can't even get my own water. Just sittin' here starin' at the wall, fightin' for air.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
Used to smoke. Quit a few years back. I'll have a beer now and then, but not much.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
My old man had breathing problems. Not sure what exactly, but he was always coughing. Died in his sixties from somethin' with his lungs.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
Yeah, had some breathing trouble a couple years ago. But nothin' like this. This is way worse. Never felt this bad before.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physical pain, maybe a 9. Chest feels like it's gonna explode. Emotionally? I'm scared, doc. Real scared. That's a 10.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
Just that it came on fast. Felt like a cold at first, then this heaviness hit. Now I can't even get across the room.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I ain't copin'. I'm just tryin' to breathe. Can't think straight. Nothin' helps. Just sittin' here waitin' for you to fix me.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
Told you, I ain't. Just gaspin' and waitin'. That's all I can do right now.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I'm not copin'! I'm just tryin' to stay alive. Please, doc, just help me. I can't keep doin' this.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I'm dyin' here. That's how I'm copin'. Now can you please just do somethin'? I can't keep answerin' this.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I already told you! I ain't copin'! I'm suffocatin'! Are you listenin' to me? Just help me breathe!
